title: 皐月賞の後に・臥薪嘗胆

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Ngh...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Forgive me, Trainer. I failed to take the crown.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
How humiliating for me to fall at the first hurdle.
What use is an Emperor who cannot meet her
subjects' expectations?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I am naive. Lacking. Pathetic.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf's eyes cloud with bitter regret...
but beneath it, a fire still burns.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: But that does not mean my dream is dead.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Two crowns remain. I will vindicate myself by
claiming the next: the Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Our campaign is not yet over. Are you with me,
Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That's it, then. We're sticking to the plan and
aiming for the Japanese Derby!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As we settle down to refocus ourselves on taking
the two remaining crowns...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Knock, knock...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Come in.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Good afternoon, President.

text_block_list.name: Student Council General Manager
text_block_list.text: Sorry to bother you...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Ah, you two. Right on time.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I apologize for making you watch such a poor
performance.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: You must be disappointed.

text_block_list.name: Student Council General Manager
text_block_list.text: Not at all!

text_block_list.name: Student Council General Manager
text_block_list.text:
You ran so magnificently, right up to the finish
line.

text_block_list.name: Student Council General Manager
text_block_list.text:
You were every bit the racer I thought you were...
Every bit the racer who inspired me to join the
student council.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I appreciate your candor. And let me swear to you
here and now...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I will become stronger still. Strong enough for you
to rely on without hesitation.

text_block_list.name: Student Council General Manager
text_block_list.text: ...President?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I apologize for not seeing your troubles sooner. A
sign that I must pay closer attention to those
around me, no doubt.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
If you want to become stronger, I will happily
guide you. I don't want you to suffer in silence.

text_block_list.name: Student Council General Manager
text_block_list.text: B-but you're so busy! I couldn't possibly...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
It's no burden at all. I would be honored to help
you flourish.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: So I ask you to give me one more chance...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: And trust that I am strong enough to carry you.

text_block_list.name: Student Council General Manager
text_block_list.text:
Why are you being so kind to... to a waste of
space like me?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Because you are the purest incarnation of my
dream.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I have charged myself with building a world where
all Umamusume can live in bliss.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
And you joined the student council in the hopes
of growing as a person.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I will not watch you give in before you realize
your dream.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Please, don't call yourself a waste of space. If you
are struggling to find your way, I will help you
find it.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
If you look up to me as much as you say, can you
trust me to lead you in the right direction?

text_block_list.name: Student Council General Manager
text_block_list.text: President...

text_block_list.name: Student Council General Manager
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry I've been acting so scared. I... Sniff... I'll follow you wherever you lead me...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Now, now, don't cry. I'm delighted to see you've
found your resolve.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like the issue at hand has been resolved.
Rudolf has a knack for leading through
strength—a tactic befitting an Emperor.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But such strength requires the determination to
carry an enormous amount of responsibility on
her shoulders. And in that sense, her approach
is...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Ridiculous.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove watches from a distance, a hint of
frustration in her eyes.
